author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit 60ce879. line_sep is now computed once at the top of apply(), threaded through LineCtx, and used both for the final join and for composing Change.after in apply_insert_after/apply_insert_before (previously hardcoded \n). Three regression tests added: CRLF InsertAfter and InsertBefore assert Change.after equals the exact CRLF bytes and appears verbatim in the output text; an LF guard test locks the default. Verified: 23 workspace test suites green, clippy -D warnings clean, fmt clean. CHANGELOG entry hand-written under Unreleased/Fixed.
